privacyTitle: Your case files stay on this device
privacyBody: To work privately, Ross can set up a private assistant after setup.
This private assistant helps Ross summarize, search, and draft from case files without uploading them.
Assistant setup and optional public-law search stay separate from your case files.
privateAIIntroTitle: Private AI works locally after setup
privateAIIntroBody: Ross works locally. To do that, it sets up a private assistant after setup. This is what lets the app read and summarize case files without uploading them.
downloadConsentBody: This is the private brain of Ross. It stays on your phone and helps Ross work with case files without uploading them.
instantModeBanner: Instant Mode is on. You can capture documents, organize cases, and run basic summaries. Deeper case work will be available after the private assistant is ready.
notFoundCopy: Not found in the case file
